title: astragalus lanatus
intro: Astragalus lanatus, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the mountainous regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its adaptogenic and immune-boosting properties, containing compounds such as astragalosides and flavonoids that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The medicinal properties of Astragalus lanatus have been found to promote overall health and well-being, with potential benefits including reduced stress and fatigue, improved immune function, and enhanced cardiovascular health. Astragalus lanatus is commonly prepared as a decoction or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
